title: Trichinopoly Heat Wave
lead: Trichinopoly is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.89. The city has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave has brought extremely high temperatures to Trichinopoly, resulting in a CDD of 12.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 61%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed of 14.2 km/h is not sufficient to provide any significant relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately
